parsed.explanation: I fixed malformed XML tag usage, focusing on structural validity rather than spelling/encoding normalization of historical text. Specifically: (1) replaced the first <PRIZE>...</PRIZE> with <PRICE>...</PRICE> for consistency, (2) replaced the second <PRIZE>...</PRIZE> with <PRICE>...</PRICE>, (3) replaced the two <PRIZE>...</PRIZE> occurrences in the third BIBL with <PRICE>...</PRICE>, and corrected two mismatched closing tags: (4) </PRICE> in the fourth BIBL was already closing a <PRIZE> tag, so I changed the opening tag to <PRICE>, and (5) same correction in the fifth BIBL. All BIBL and TITLE elements are now properly nested and closed.
